args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd has been prepared, covering crm_contacts (primary-db), invoices (primary-db), usage_events (event-lake), and support_threads (helpdesk).

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: Access to Halcyon for Fernwood Ltd has now been revoked as part of contract offboarding.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and confirmation emailed to accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd is confirmed: exports will be deleted on 2026-08-16 (30 days after export preparation on 2026-07-17).

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled for 2026-08-16.
